meta.title: Area Rug Cleaning in Charlottesville, VA | Rudy's Rug Cleaning

logo.descripcion: Logo en color navy, formato rectangular

secciones.titulo: Trusted Rug Cleaning in Charlottesville, VA Since the 1960s
secciones.contenido: Locally-owned and operated, Rudy's Rug Cleaning has been helping Charlottesville and Albemarle area families care for their rugs for over 60 years.

At Rudy's Rug Cleaning, we believe caring for your rugs should be simple, honest, and effective. Since the 1960s, families across the greater Charlottesville area have trusted us to refresh and restore their favorite rugs using time-tested methods, gentle soap-based cleaning, and transparent pricing. Whether you're dealing with everyday dirt or stubborn pet stains, we're here to help — with pickup and delivery options to make it even easier.

secciones.titulo: Rated EXCELLENT on TrustPilot and Google:
secciones.contenido:

TG: "Rudy's friendly staff and expert rug cleaning make them my go-to..."

Katie F.: "Our first time getting high-end wool rugs cleaned. After reading reviews..."

Mary M.: "They were friendly, trusting and knowledgeable about rug cleaning..."
Outlaw Design Company: "My drop off experience couldn't have been better..."
Liza E.: "Pick up and delivery were right on time! And the rug looks so good!"
Elizabeth L.: "ALWAYS timely, thorough, and terrific."
Leslie: "Helpful, careful, and friendly"
Amy G.: "Guys were pleasant and very helpful about rug placement..."
John & Kathy D.: "Always welcoming, rugs cleaned and affordable. Thank you so much!"
Linda H.: "Really nice staff and my rugs look fantastic. I don't live in Charlottesville..."

We follow a multi-step process that gently but thoroughly washes your rug:
- Dusting to remove embedded grit
- Soaking in cold water with plant-based detergent
- Gentle agitation to release soil and odors
- Centrifuge spinning for moisture removal
- Hanging & drying in a climate-controlled room

Learn more about our rug cleaning process and the services we offer.

imagenes.alt: Close-up of a colorful woven rug with traditional patterns, partially rolled up to reveal the underside, on a tiled floor with a person's bare feet nearby.
imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de limpieza profesional de alfombras

secciones.contenido:
Busy schedule? Let us handle the logistics. We offer:
- Pickup and delivery services in Charlottesville and surrounding areas
- 10% discount for customers who drop off at our location

Visit us at 605 Cami Lane, or schedule a pickup through our online booking link.

imagenes.alt: A small cardboard box labeled 'Fragile Handle With Care' is being held on a person's hand with sunlight in the background.
imagenes.descripcion: Imagen de servicio de recogida y entrega

secciones.contenido: Protect your floors and extend the life of your rug with our high-quality rug pads — customized to fit your space perfectly. Click here to get a quote.

imagenes.alt: Close-up of a rolled-up patterned Persian rug with intricate circular and geometric designs in black, red, beige, and orange colors.

secciones.contenido:
- Serving Charlottesville since the 1960s
- Locally owned and operated
- Simple, soap-based cleaning formulas
- Transparent pricing — no hidden fees
- Trusted by generations of local families
